fixes.rationale: Avoid doing the full release-store reset on every disabled failover sample; reset only when a window had been started, then return cheaply while disabled.

skipped.reason: Requires changing the tracker synchronization model around window rollover and counter updates; no safe single-line or small anchored replacement is sufficient.
The correct remediation is removing the checked-in transcript file, which is not safely expressible as a single anchored line replacement.
